description: A lead record for 'Patricia Hernandez' from 'Summit Industrial Supplies' exists in the Vtiger CRM Leads module. The new Opportunity must be named 'Summit Industrial - Bulk Fastener Supply Contract' with an amount of 45000, an expected close date of 2025-03-31, and a sales stage of 'Needs Analysis'.
